info.name: Rawdah API
info.description:
Postman collection for Rawdah API (Go + Gin). Includes auth, family, tasks, rewards, Islamic content, quizzes, lessons, learn, messages, rants, requests, games, dashboard, notifications, push, upload, and health.

Auth:
1. POST /v1/auth/signup – create family + parent.
2. POST /v1/auth/signin – sign in parent/adult (sets access_token variable).
3. POST /v1/auth/child/signin – sign in child.
4. POST /v1/auth/refresh – refresh access token using refresh cookie.
5. POST /v1/auth/signout – clear refresh cookie.

All /v1 routes (except /v1/auth/*) require Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}.

Some endpoints require specific roles and permissions (parent, adult_relative, child).

request.description:
Simple health check.

Response: { "status": "ok", "time": "..." }

Sign up a new family and parent user.

Body:
- family_name (string, required)
- slug (string, required, lowercase letters/numbers/hyphens)
- name (string, required)
- email (string, required, email)
- password (string, required, min 8)

On success (201):
- Sets a refresh cookie `rawdah_refresh` (HTTP-only)
- Returns: { "access_token", "user", "family" }

Sign in a parent or adult-relative user.

Body:
- email (string, required)
- password (string, required)

On success (200):
- Sets HTTP-only refresh cookie `rawdah_refresh`.
- Returns: { "access_token", "user", "family" }.

This request has a test script to set {{access_token}} from the response.

exec: console.log("Failed to parse JSON or set access_token", e);

request.description:
Sign in a child user.

Body:
- family_slug (string, required)
- username (string, required)
- password (string, required)

On success (200):
- Children do NOT receive a refresh cookie.
- Response: { "access_token", "user", "family" }

Refresh access token using the HTTP-only refresh cookie `rawdah_refresh`.

This relies on cookies managed by Postman. Make sure the previous signin/signup response set the cookie.

On success (200):
- Returns new { "access_token", "user", "family" }.
- Renews the refresh cookie.

Sign out: invalidates refresh token and clears `rawdah_refresh` cookie.

Response: { "message": "signed out" }

Change current user's password.

Body:
- current_password (string, required)
- new_password (string, required, must meet length rules)

Headers:
- Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}
Get current family details.
Update family name/logo (parent only).
List family members.

Create a new family member (parent only).

Body:
- role (string, required: parent | adult_relative | child)
- name (string, required)
- username (string, optional)
- email (string, optional)
- password (string, required)
- date_of_birth (ISO8601, optional)
- game_limit_minutes (int, optional)

Get a specific family member.

Path variables:
- member_id: UUID of user.
Update fields for a family member (parent only).
Deactivate a family member (parent only).
Get number of rants for a child.
List access-control permissions for adult relatives.

Set permissions for an adult_relative (parent only).

Permissions examples:
- view_dashboard
- assign_tasks
- view_tasks
- approve_rewards
- view_messages
- manage_quizzes
- manage_learn
- respond_requests
Revoke all permissions for an adult_relative.

query.description: Optional: filter by status (e.g. pending, in_progress, completed).
Optional: user ID to filter by (non-child roles only).

request.description:
List tasks.

Children automatically see only their own tasks.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Clean your room",
  "description": "Tidy up and vacuum.",
  "assigned_to": "{{child_id}}",
  "reward_id": null,
  "due_date": "2024-12-31T18:00:00Z"
}

request.description:
Create a new task (parent or adult_relative with permission).

Body:
- title (string, required)
- description (string|null)
- assigned_to (string UUID, required)
- reward_id (string UUID|null)
- due_date (ISO8601|null)

Get a single task.

Children can only see their own tasks.

Update a task's main fields (parent/adult_relative with permission).

Body:
- title (string, required)
- description (string|null)
- reward_id (string UUID|null)
- due_date (ISO8601|null)
Delete a task (parent/adult_relative with permission).
Mark a task as started (child only).
Mark a task as completed (child only).
Child requests reward for a completed task.
Approve a task reward (parent/adult_relative with approve_rewards permission).
Decline a task reward (parent/adult_relative with approve_rewards permission).
List rewards for the family.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Extra screen time",
  "description": "30 minutes of extra game time",
  "value": 1,
  "type": "time",
  "icon": "⏱️"
}

request.description:
Create a reward.

Body:
- title (string, required)
- description (string|null)
- value (float)
- type (string)
- icon (string|null)

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Extra screen time",
  "description": "45 minutes of extra game time",
  "value": 1.5,
  "type": "time",
  "icon": "⏱️"
}

request.description: Update a reward (parent only).
Delete a reward (parent only).

query.description: Optional difficulty filter (e.g. easy, medium, hard).

request.description: List hadiths (all authenticated users).
Get a random hadith (optionally filtered by difficulty).
Get all hadiths for which the child completed quizzes.
Get a hadith by ID.
List prophets with story summaries.
Get prophet by ID.
List Quran verses with optional topic/difficulty filters.
Get Quran verse by ID.
Assign a hadith quiz to a child.
Assign a prophet quiz.
Assign a Quran quiz.
List quizzes for the family (parent/adult_relative). Children calling this automatically get their own via ListMine.
List quizzes assigned to the current child.

Get a specific quiz by type and ID.

Path params:
- type: hadith | prophet | quran
- quiz_id: quiz UUID
Start a quiz as the child.

Submit answers for a quiz.

The API will determine correctness; `is_correct` can be ignored or left false, but the structure requires it.
List Quran lessons assigned in the family.
Create/assign a Quran lesson.
List Quran lessons assigned to the current child.
Get a Quran lesson by ID.
Mark a Quran lesson as completed by the child.
List learn content for the family (created by parents/adult_relatives).

Create learn content.

Body:
- assigned_to (string UUID|null)
- title (string, required)
- content_type (string, required, e.g. "text")
- content (string, required)
- reward_id (string UUID|null)
List learn content assigned to the current child.
Mark learn content as completed by the child.
List conversations for the current user (needs view_messages permission for certain roles).
Get message thread between current user and another family member.
Send a message to another family member.
Mark a message as read.
List child's rants (child role only).

Create a child rant.

Body:
- title (string|null)
- content (string, required)
- password (string|null, locks content)

header.description: Optional: needed if rant is locked.

request.description: Get a rant by ID. If locked and no X-Rant-Password provided, only metadata is returned with is_locked=true.
Update a rant (child only).
Delete a rant (child only).
List requests in the family (permissions may differ by role).
Create a request (child). target_id may be null to broadcast.
Get a specific request by ID.

Respond to a request.

status examples: approved | rejected.
List available games that can be time-tracked.
Start a game session (child). Enforces daily game limit.
End a game session for the child.

query.description: Optional: filter by user_id. Children only see their own.

request.description: List game sessions (family-wide or per user).
Summary stats for family dashboard.
Task completion metrics for given period.
Game time metrics for given period.
Quiz score metrics for given period.
Learn content progress metrics.
List notifications for current user.
Mark all notifications as read.
Mark a single notification as read.

Add a push subscription for the current user.

Values should come from the browser's PushSubscription object.
Remove a push subscription for the current user.

Get a pre-signed upload URL for user avatar.

Requires R2 to be configured; otherwise returns 503.
Confirm avatar upload after PUT to R2.
Get a pre-signed upload URL for family logo (parent only).
Confirm family logo upload.

WebSocket endpoint used by the app for real-time updates.

Postman is not ideal for WebSocket in this REST-style collection, but some Postman versions support WS connections.

Connect to:
- URL: ws://localhost:8080/ws (or wss:// in production)
- Headers:
  - Origin: one of ALLOWED_ORIGINS
  - Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}

The server upgrades if origin and auth are valid.
